nodes.description: Quillan: standards-based writing evidence capture

arguments.help: Show the installed Quillan version and exit.

nodes.short_help: Show a read-only assignment review dashboard.
nodes.description: Combine roster, submission, page, review, feedback-export, routed-evidence, and scan-review status without creating or modifying files.

nodes.short_help: Show compact read-only review status for one student.
nodes.description: Inspect one student's assignment, roster, routed evidence, submission, review workflow, artifact counts, and feedback-export freshness without writing files.

nodes.short_help: Manage standards-based review workflow state in review.json.
nodes.description: Manage review.json.review_state. This is separate from the lightweight submission.json.submission_state model.

nodes.short_help: Manually override one student's review workflow state.
nodes.description: Manually override review.json.review_state without changing submission.json.submission_state. This workflow-only change does not infer or create review artifacts appropriate to the selected phase.

arguments.help: Explicitly confirm this review.json workflow-state write.

nodes.short_help: Create, show, and validate canonical assignments.
Create a canonical workspace assignment config.
Show a canonical workspace assignment config.
Validate a canonical assignment and workspace standards.
Generate canonical printable response class packets.
Generate one combined packet from a canonical assignment and roster.

arguments.help: Number of numbered response pages per roster student (default: 1).
Replace the existing canonical packet; requires --yes.
Validate and report without writing files.

nodes.short_help: Review assignment minimum requirements for one assembled submission.
nodes.description: List and record teacher-entered minimum-requirement judgments for one canonical assembled submission. These commands do not inspect student writing or infer checks or outcomes.

nodes.short_help: List configured requirements and current teacher-entered status.
nodes.description: Read the canonical assignment, assembled submission manifest, and optional review record without writing any files.

nodes.short_help: Create or update one configured teacher-entered check.
nodes.description: Resolve a requirement key from the canonical assignment and record the teacher's explicit met/not-met judgment in canonical review.json.

arguments.help: Configured key, such as paragraphs_min or required_elements:thesis.
Explicit teacher judgment: true or false.
Optional nonblank teacher note; omission clears an earlier note.

nodes.short_help: Set an eligible teacher-selected overall outcome.
nodes.description: Set met, unmet_continue_review, or returned_without_full_review after validating configured checks and canonical assignment policy.

arguments.help: Optional nonblank teacher note; required when returning without full standards review.

nodes.short_help: Display or replace review units for one assembled submission.
nodes.description: Display or explicitly replace canonical review units without inspecting student evidence or inferring unit boundaries.

nodes.short_help: Display current review units without writing files.
Replace all review units from a count or JSON file.

arguments.help: Create canonical units with sequences 1 through COUNT.
UTF-8 JSON file containing constrained review-unit definitions.

nodes.short_help: List, record, and complete review-unit Focus Standard observations.
nodes.description: List, record, or explicitly complete teacher-entered Focus Standard observations without inspecting evidence or inferring judgments.

nodes.short_help: List all current unit-standard observation pairs.
Create or replace one teacher-entered observation.
Explicitly complete observations, including when pairs are unobserved.
nodes.description: Explicitly mark the observation phase complete for an existing review with defined units. Missing observations do not block completion and none are created automatically; only canonical review workflow state is changed.

nodes.short_help: List, record, and complete overall Focus Standard ratings.
nodes.description: Display or record explicit teacher-entered overall Focus Standard ratings without inspecting evidence or inferring judgments.

nodes.short_help: List assignment Focus Standards and current overall ratings.
Create or replace one teacher-entered overall rating.

arguments.help: Integer value from the assignment-owned rating scale.
Optional teacher rationale; omission or blank text clears it.
Required explicit teacher choice: true or false.

nodes.short_help: Explicitly mark overall ratings complete, including when ratings are missing.
Display and compose student-facing Focus Standard feedback.
nodes.description: Display or explicitly compose Focus Standard feedback for one assembled submission. Composition does not inspect evidence, generate language, or export feedback.

nodes.short_help: Display current feedback choices without writing files.
Replace feedback options for one Focus Standard.

arguments.help: Comma-separated eligible observation IDs; omission clears the selection.

nodes.short_help: Add one exact teacher-authored feedback comment.
nodes.description: Add exact teacher-authored text. When saving for reuse, remove all student-specific details from the separately approved reusable text.

nodes.short_help: Copy one compatible reusable comment as a stable review snapshot.
Explicitly mark feedback composed; missing content produces warnings.
Create, show, validate, and modify canonical class rosters.
nodes.description: Manage canonical shared class rosters non-interactively. Student IDs are strings and leading zeros are preserved.

nodes.short_help: Create a canonical roster and class metadata from a validated CSV.

arguments.help: Consecutive school year (YYYY-YYYY); defaults to the active year.
Replace both existing roster.csv and class.json; requires --yes.

nodes.short_help: Display every canonical roster column without writing.
Validate canonical roster.csv and existing class.json.
Append one string-ID student; leading zeros are preserved.

arguments.help: String student ID; leading zeros remain.
Set an existing optional roster column; repeat for multiple columns. This cannot add columns or set required fields.

nodes.short_help: Update one student while preserving its stable string student_id.
nodes.description: Update an active-roster student. The positional student_id is stable and cannot be changed.

arguments.help: Stable string student ID; leading zeros remain.
Set an existing optional roster column; repeat for multiple columns. This cannot add columns or set required fields.

nodes.short_help: Remove one student only from the active roster.csv.
nodes.description: Remove a student only from the active roster. Historical evidence and all other class/module data are retained.

arguments.help: Exact string student ID; leading zeros remain.

nodes.short_help: Retain scans once and dispatch PDS2 QR locators through Core.
nodes.description: Retain one supported image/PDF or each supported direct child of a folder exactly once, then detect PDS2 QR text and dispatch ordered physical pages through the installed PDS Core module registry.

arguments.help: Path to a supported scan file or direct-child scan folder.

nodes.short_help: List unresolved and deferred Quillan scan review items.
nodes.description: List valid Quillan routing-review records. Resolved records are hidden unless --include-resolved is supplied.

arguments.help: Include review items whose latest resolution is resolved.
Show at most this many matching review items.

nodes.short_help: Resolve or defer one Quillan scan review item.
nodes.description: Write a new immutable shared resolution record for one valid Quillan routing-review failure.

arguments.help: Teacher message. Required for action 'other'; defaults otherwise.
Optional workspace-relative evidence path for evidence_filed; it must be an existing ordinary non-link file in the affected work.
Exact registered PDS2 route ID for a route action.
Canonical class ID for a route action; may default from a work-scoped failure.
Canonical assignment ID for a route action; may default from a work-scoped failure.

nodes.short_help: List Quillan-owned post-dispatch review occurrences.
nodes.description: List immutable post-dispatch occurrences from one selected module-qualified Quillan assignment. Resolved occurrences are hidden unless --include-resolved is supplied; deferred occurrences remain visible.

arguments.help: Include occurrences whose latest resolution is resolved.
Show at most this many matching occurrences.
Filter by exact Quillan post-dispatch category.

nodes.short_help: Resolve or defer one Quillan post-dispatch occurrence.
nodes.description: Append one Quillan-owned resolution beneath the selected module-qualified work root. The immutable occurrence and all evidence, observations, scans, manifests, and reviews are retained.

arguments.help: Explicit teacher-selected post-dispatch resolution action. Successful retry resolution is available only from the interactive workflow after a current shared-service retry succeeds.

nodes.short_help: Retain and strictly decode PDS2 QR locators without routing.
nodes.description: Retain a supported source once, decode each physical page, and display strict Core PDS2 locator fields without module resolution, dispatch, routed evidence, or submission writes.

arguments.help: Path to a supported image or PDF scan file.
Explicitly include sensitive raw QR payload text in diagnostics.

nodes.short_help: Assemble assignment submissions from persisted page observations.
nodes.description: Discover immutable response-page observations and assemble one issuance-authoritative submission manifest per student while preserving existing teacher state.

nodes.short_help: Create a review-ready submission for physical plain-paper work.
nodes.description: Validate and create an evidence-less submission manifest and empty review record for work completed on physical plain paper.

arguments.help: Confirm creation without an interactive prompt.
Validate and report target paths without writing files.

nodes.short_help: Inspect or change one student's canonical submission pages.
nodes.description: List or explicitly change page-management state in one canonical submission manifest. Evidence files and review data are not changed.

nodes.short_help: List manifest page and evidence state without writing.
Exclude a page from active review without deleting evidence.

arguments.help: Positive logical page number in the current manifest.
Explicitly confirm this manifest-only page change.

nodes.short_help: Restore an excluded page using preserved state or safe fallback.

arguments.help: Positive logical page number in the current manifest.
Explicitly confirm this manifest-only page change.

nodes.short_help: Mark a page as requiring corrected evidence.

arguments.help: Positive logical page number in the current manifest.
Explicitly confirm this manifest-only page change.

nodes.short_help: List read-only assignment submission and evidence status.
nodes.description: Load existing submission manifests and discover routed response evidence without creating or modifying any files.

nodes.short_help: Open selected evidence pages for one student submission.
nodes.description: Open selected evidence pages for one student submission. By default, opens all selected evidence pages in page-number order. Use --page to open one logical response page.

arguments.help: Open only one logical response page number.
Open one explicit evidence candidate belonging to this canonical submission and, when supplied, --page.

nodes.short_help: Update one student's lightweight submission state.
nodes.description: Update only submission.json.submission_state and updated_at in one canonical student submission manifest. This does not change review.json.review_state.

arguments.help: Lightweight submission state stored in submission.json: unreviewed, in_progress, needs_rescan, or reviewed.

nodes.short_help: Add a teacher note to one student review record.
nodes.description: Append one teacher-entered note to the canonical review.json for a student submission. Creates review.json when the adjacent submission.json exists and validates.

nodes.short_help: Export student-facing feedback from one review record.
nodes.description: Generate student-facing feedback from the canonical review.json for one student submission. PDF export updates feedback export metadata after a successful write.

arguments.help: Replace existing feedback export files for the selected format.

nodes.short_help: Export a comprehensive assignment-local class summary CSV for audit/troubleshooting.
nodes.description: Generate a comprehensive audit/troubleshooting CSV summary from existing submission and review records for one class assignment. The export reports submission/review status, minimum-requirement outcomes, Focus Standard ratings, and feedback export status. It does not mutate canonical records or evidence.

nodes.short_help: Export a compact student-by-Focus-Standard performance summary CSV.
nodes.description: Generate the ordinary teacher-facing student performance report with review status, minimum requirements, and one readable rating column per assignment Focus Standard.

nodes.short_help: Export an assignment-local Focus Standard summary CSV.
nodes.description: Generate a teacher-facing assignment-local CSV summary of teacher-entered overall Focus Standard ratings for one class assignment. The export includes minimum-requirement outcomes and feedback export status, and does not mutate canonical records or evidence.

nodes.short_help: List, inspect, and create reusable Focus Standard comments.
nodes.description: Manage teacher-authored reusable Focus Standard comments without an assignment or student context. Text is stored as supplied; do not include student names, IDs, or assignment-specific private details.

nodes.short_help: List active, student-facing reusable comments.
Show every comment and all metadata in one comment set.
Create one manually authored reusable comment.
nodes.description: Create one student-facing reusable comment. The text is preserved, not generated or rewritten. Do not include student names, IDs, or private assignment-specific details.

nodes.short_help: Manage the shared Paper Data Suite workspace.
Show the active Paper Data Suite workspace status.
Validate, create, and save a shared workspace root.

arguments.help: Folder to use as the shared Paper Data Suite workspace.

nodes.short_help: Validate or create the currently resolved workspace root.
Clear the saved workspace preference without deleting files.
Launch the teacher-facing interactive menu.
